subcodes.first_line: O Amin! Upon thee be My glory and loving-kindness. Praise befitteth and beseemeth the Desired One Who, through His complete power and will [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امین علیک بهائی و عنایتی حمد مقصودی را لایق و سزاست که بقدرت کامله و اراده
subcodes.subjects: @business; financial; property matters, @call to action, @status of material wealth; wealth and poverty, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @review of publications
